channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bags of household rubbish dumped in garden, 24th May
item.description:
Someone is dumping rubbish by the recycling receptacle. It is often full of food waste so foxes are getting into it and and spreading it everywhere. It's been happening repeatedly for the last couple of weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westmount Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop line faded on A,B,C, E- required repainting Pedestrian stud faded on G, I, J, K, L- required repainting, 24th May
item.description:
Stop line faded on A,B,C, E- required repainting Pedestrian stud faded on G, I, J, K, L- required repainting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Roundway, West Green, Greater London

item.title: Stop line on A, B phase faded-required repainting by borough Bottom site door unable to open due to green/weed around controller to cut by borough, 24th May
item.description:
Stop line on A, B phase faded-required repainting by borough Bottom site door unable to open due to green/weed around controller to cut by borough
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 396, West Green Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees damaging building, 24th May
item.description:
There are several overgrown trees behind my garden (39 Okehampton crescent, DA16 1DG), and they are causing a few issues and the branches are starting to grow into AND on top of my outbuilding. I’m also concerned that the weight of the branches could damage the asbestos roof, as they cover more than half the roof now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Okehampton Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside the forties building, 23rd May
item.description:
Light does not come on
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, Islip Street, Kentish Town, Greater London

item.title: South Aldershot Road, 23rd May

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Glass, 23rd May
item.description:
Its been they for days city of london not cleaning the road thank you and its glasses

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haydon Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bertram Road, 23rd May
item.description:
Someone has dumped fencing panels by the green box on Bertram Road at Southbury Road end it makes it difficult for people to pass especially people who are partially sighted like me.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southbury Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal dumping of lime bikes continues, 23rd May
item.description:
This must stop! More bikes than the correct area. No lime staff to look after… just inappropriate illegal dumping of bikes. Why are lime not being fined? If I parked my car in spots not allowed I would be fined. Can we not start fining lime bikes please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Charlotte Road, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glad pane/screen smashed on grass, 23rd May
item.description:
This appeared in the past 2 days - totally smashed, very dangerous. Children play here and people walk their pets here. Grass common on Wynford way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wynford Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove-Street Sign dangerously bent, 23rd May
item.description:
The street sign, near the car wash is bent over. It nerds to be straightened as it could fall on pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thurlow Park Road SE21 outside property number 48, 23rd May
item.description:
Thurlow Park Road SE21 outside property number 48 Lambeth black plastic bin graffiti tagged. Yes Thurlow Park Road is a TfL road but Lambeth responsible for litter et al and so this bin is your property so graffiti is your issue. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurlow Park Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light, 23rd May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Cloverdale Gardens, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Thurlow Park Road SE21 outside property number 68, 23rd May
item.description:
Thurlow Park Road SE21 outside property number 68 Lambeth black bin (with some kind of rough surface treatment on it) graffiti tagged. Yes Thurlow Park Road is a TfL road but Lambeth responsible for litter et al and so this bin is your property so graffiti is your issue. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurlow Park Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter & fly tipping, 23rd May
item.description:
The litter in the Sun in the Sands pedestrian subways has accumulated over many weeks.. it used to get swept once a week. It in no way complies with the legal mrequirements of the Environmental Protection Act.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
